历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 12952 → 18630 → 22358 → 16982 → 20939, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend; the 2025 baseline is about 20939, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2300 positions in the last 3 years; the provincial science group enrollment plan was 27 in 2021, 110 in 2022, 114 in 2023, 101 in 2024, and 107 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 116, a slight expansion of about 8.4% compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026, with a continuous improvement in recent years, enhancing the school's overall strength and recognition; the school's reputation has been stable recently, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity ranking is 80th (rated 'average'), with short video platform exposure at a medium level, showing no sudden surge in application attention; Ethnology A+ (top nationally), Chinese Language and Literature A-, Sociology A-, directly corresponding to the school's enrollment majors such as Ethnology, Chinese Language and Literature, and Sociology, strongly attracting liberal arts students; although the science group's Computer, Electronic Information, etc., lack direct A-class discipline support, they benefit from the overall improvement of the school's level.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, aligning with the school's science group enrollment majors (Computer, Electronic Information, Statistics, etc.); the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 1.2 million (including uncertain marks), estimated at about 734,000 based on the recent physics category proportion of about 61%, an increase of about 32% compared to 555,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the 2025 physics category undergraduate batch score is 427, with little fluctuation in recent years; the school is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Henan candidates; the school has a large enrollment scale in Henan (100+ in the science group), making it one of the institutions with a relatively high proportion of cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 20939, an 8.4% expansion in 2026, a significant 32% increase in provincial physics category candidates (further pushing up the ranking number), and the continuous improvement of the school's ranking (enhancing appeal, slightly narrowing the backward shift range), it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 level; the predicted minimum ranking is about 22196, with a range of 21696–22696.
